No immediate breakthrough on disengagement in friction areas.
Focus on Eastern Ladakh friction points.
Both sides agreed to maintain communication.
mainsPoints: Analyze the persistent challenges in India-China border relations and their implications for regional stability.
Discuss the significance of military-to-military dialogue in managing border disputes between nuclear-armed neighbors.
Evaluate India's strategic approach to border management and maintaining territorial integrity along the LAC.
Examine the broader geopolitical context influencing India-China relations.
GS3.imageDescription: Indian and Chinese military officers shaking hands at a border meeting point (stock image).
GS3.trivia: The Line of Actual Control (LAC) is a demarcation line that separates Indian-controlled territory from Chinese-controlled territory in the former princely state of Jammu and Kashmir. It is not a legally defined border.

GS3.headline: NITI Aayog Releases Report on Leveraging Digital Public Infrastructure for Inclusive Growth
GS3.explainer:
• NITI Aayog published a comprehensive report detailing strategies for leveraging India's Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI) to foster inclusive growth and achieve sustainable development goals.
• The report highlights the success of Aadhaar, UPI, and other digital platforms in enhancing financial inclusion, public service delivery, and market efficiency.
• It proposes policy recommendations for expanding DPI adoption, ensuring data privacy and security, and building digital literacy across diverse populations.
• The focus is on creating a robust digital ecosystem that can drive innovation, reduce inequalities, and empower citizens.
• The recommendations aim to guide future investments and policy formulations in the digital transformation journey.
gsSubTopics: Indian Economy and issues relating to planning, mobilization of resources, growth, development and employment.
Inclusive Growth and issues arising from it.
Science and Technology- Developments and their Applications and Effects in Everyday Life.
prelimsPoints: NITI Aayog report on Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI).
Highlights Aadhaar, UPI as successful DPI examples.
Recommendations for data privacy, security, digital literacy.
Aims for inclusive growth and SDGs.
mainsPoints: Discuss the concept of Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI) and its transformative potential for India's economy and society.
Analyze the successes and challenges in implementing DPIs like Aadhaar and UPI in India.
Evaluate how DPI can contribute to achieving financial inclusion, efficient public service delivery, and sustainable development goals.
Examine the policy measures required to ensure secure, equitable, and widespread adoption of DPI.
GS3.trivia: UPI (Unified Payments Interface) recorded over 11.7 billion transactions in May 2024, cementing its position as a leading digital payment system globally.

GS3.headline: India Successfully Tests New Generation Agni Missile, Enhancing Deterrence Capabilities
GS3.explainer:
• India successfully conducted the developmental test of a new generation Agni series missile, further bolstering its strategic deterrence capabilities.
• The missile, developed by the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), demonstrated advanced propulsion systems, guidance accuracy, and maneuverability.
• This test is part of India's ongoing efforts to modernize its strategic arsenal and ensure credible minimum deterrence in a complex security environment.
• The Agni series of missiles are surface-to-surface ballistic missiles, forming a cornerstone of India's integrated guided missile development program.
• The successful launch reiterates India's self-reliance in advanced defense technologies and strengthens its regional security posture.
gsSubTopics: Science and Technology- Developments and their Applications and Effects in Everyday Life.
Achievements of Indians in science & technology; indigenization of technology and developing new technology.
Security challenges and their management in border areas – linkages of organized crime with terrorism.
Various Security forces and agencies and their mandate.
prelimsPoints: India successfully tested a new generation Agni series missile.
Developed by DRDO.
Enhances strategic deterrence capabilities.
Agni missiles are surface-to-surface ballistic missiles.
mainsPoints: Discuss the significance of India's integrated guided missile development program (IGMDP) in enhancing its national security.
Analyze the concept of 'credible minimum deterrence' and how advanced missile technologies contribute to it.
Evaluate India's progress towards self-reliance in defense manufacturing and technology.
Examine the geopolitical implications of India's growing strategic capabilities.
GS3.imageDescription: Agni missile being launched from a mobile launcher.
GS3.trivia: The Agni series of missiles derive their name from the Sanskrit word for fire, symbolizing their power.
